name: ux_spec
description: Form UX Spec — user flows, IA, list screens, specification each screen (actions/sections/validation/states), criteria UX quality for development and testing.
default_prompt: Use $ux_spec when the task matches the "UX Spec (Flows + Screens + States)" skill.
triggers: Form UX Spec — user flows, IA, list screens, specification each screen (actions/sections/validation/states), criteria UX quality for development and testing
